channel.title: Art on Te Moana Mahana
channel.description: Recent content in Art on Te Moana Mahana

item.title: Sculpture on the Gulf 2027
item.description: Gabby O’Connor is an artist and scientist who is also one of our team members who is working on within the “Ocean Connections” project. Recently, she was chosen as one of the artists to help contribute a scultpure for the Sculpture on the Gulf 2027 exhibition, which is held biennially on the coastal headland of Matiatia Bay, Waiheke Island. This year, it is being held from the 26th Feburary to the 29th March 2027.
